FEIYAP_KEYWORD_VOID_HOLE.title: Void Hole
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_VOID_HOLE.description: Whenever this creature gains a debuff, gain 1 additional stack of [gold]Void Hole[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_IAIDO.title: Iaido
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_IAIDO.description: When attacked, consume [gold]Iaido[/gold] equal to the damage to negate it and counter for the same amount. All [gold]Iaido[/gold] is removed when you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] or at turn start. [gold]Dexterity[/gold] amplifies [gold]Iaido[/gold] gained.
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_INTERNAL_BURN.title: Internal Burn
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_INTERNAL_BURN.description: Lose 1 HP whenever this creature attacks. At the end of its turn, lose 1 stack.
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_CONSTELLATION.title: Constellation
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_ZANXIN.title: Zanxin
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_ZANXIN.description: Your next [gold]Block[/gold] or [gold]Iaido[/gold] gain is increased by 1.
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_HEAT_DEATH.title: Heat Death
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_HEAT_DEATH.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP. At the end of your turn, double your [gold]Heat Death[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_UPRIGHT.title: Tarot - Upright
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_UPRIGHT.description: The last card played was a [gold]Skill[/gold].
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_REVERSED.title: Tarot - Reversed
FEIYAP_KEYWORD_TAROT_REVERSED.descriptio: The last card played was an [gold]Attack[/gold].
